#+title: Add currency and country party-visibility junctions
#+description: Add currency and country party-visibility junctions
#+type: capture
#+level: cross
#+filetags: :code:capture:next:
#+created: 2026-05-21
#+updated: 2026-07-11

This page is a [[id:671F18E4-E09C-4B3B-BD24-D33DF8AE38A6][capture]] in the *discarded* bucket of the product backlog.

*Resolved (deep backlog refinement, 2026-07-11)*: Found projects/ores.sql/create/refdata/refdata_party_currency_create.sql and refdata_party_country_create.sql, both auto-generated junction tables explicitly described as 'controlling which currencies/countries are visible to which parties' with currency/country definitions remaining shared at tenant level -- exactly matching the capture's acceptance criteria. Corresponding drop scripts (refdata_party_currencies_drop.sql, refdata_party_countries_drop.sql) also exist.

Add junction tables (=party_currencies=, =party_countries=) that control which
currencies and countries a given party can see and use. The underlying reference
data definitions remain shared at the tenant level; only visibility is
per-party.

**** Acceptance Criteria

- Junction tables created with proper constraints.
- Party-scoped queries for currencies and countries filter through junctions.
- Default: all currencies/countries visible to all parties (opt-in restriction).
